holdings.infoBox: RSMV is an equity ETF with a total of 25 individual holdings. The top holdings are iShares Core U.S. Aggregate Bond ETF stock at 24.54%, State Street SPDR Portfolio Short Term Treasury ETF at 10.17%, Applied Materials at 3.90%, Lam Research at 3.69%, and Intel at 3.61%.

overview.description: The Relative Strength Managed Volatility Strategy ETF 1Shs (RSMV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks capital appreciation by actively managing a narrow portfolio of US growth stocks of any capitalization. The selection process combines top-down macroeconomic and bottom-up analysis. RSMV was launched on Jan 13, 2025 and is issued by Teucrium.
